sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness, particularly when standing. He denies chest pain, shortness of breath, or a history of falls. He states he's been feeling lightheaded for the past week.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm, regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable, with no focal deficits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for orthostatic hypotension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order a tilt table test to evaluate for autonomic dysfunction. I will also recommend increasing fluid intake and avoiding rapid position changes.
